## Scope check

- [ ] Does this fit one of the existing layers (Photon / Phonon /
      Spinor / Platform), or does it require a new one?
- [ ] Does it conflict with any of the
      [seven critical rules](https://nimesh08.github.io/quantum-stack/internals/seven_rules/)?
      If so, which rule and why is the trade-off worth it?
